title: Romania Sells Euro and Dollar Bonds After Budget Reforms
description: Romania tapped international debt markets for the first time this year to capitalize on improved sentiment after the government pushed through reforms needed to reduce the budget deficit.
content: Romania tapped international debt markets for the first time this year to capitalize on improved sentiment after the government pushed through reforms needed to reduce the budget deficit.
